title: Internal Administration Circulars :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Internal Administration Circulars
Internal Administration Circulars (IAC) give immigration staff information about our procedures and processes. We publish these circulars when they are developed. They generally provide clarity about the instructions contained within the New Zealand Operational Manual, but are not part of the Manual.
Search Internal Administration Circulars (IACs)
IACs are not part of the INZ Operational Manual. Some IACs have been archived.
